content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://2024modulescorecard.pvel.com/damp-heat/", "source_title": "Damp Heat Test | Kiwa PVEL PV Module Reliability Scorecard", "source_type": "industry_report", "source_quality": 0.45, "overall_relevance": 0.3, "year": 2024, "authors": [], "venue": "Kiwa PVEL 2024 Scorecard", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Only 69% of bills of materials tested degraded by less than 6% power loss after damp heat testing in the 2024 PVEL scorecard.", "direct_quote": "Only 69% of BOMs tested degraded by 6%", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.35, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Industry", "entities": ["PVEL", "BOM", "69%", "6% degradation", "damp heat"]}, {"statement": "11% of bills of materials experienced one or more failures during damp heat testing, which was double the failure rate reported in the 2023 Scorecard.", "direct_quote": "11% of BOMs experienced one or more failures during DH testing. The DH failure rate was double that reported in the 2023 Scorecard", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.33, "confidence": 0.89, "perspective": "Industry", "entities": ["11% failure rate", "damp heat", "BOM", "PVEL", "2023 Scorecard"]}, {"statement": "Median power degradation following damp heat was 1.3% for BOMs produced in 2022 and 1.6% for BOMs produced in 2023.", "direct_quote": "median degradation following DH of 1.3% for BOMs produced in 2022 and 1.6% for BOMs produced in 2023", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.31, "confidence": 0.9, "perspective": "Industry", "entities": ["median degradation", "1.3%", "1.6%", "2022 BOM", "2023 BOM", "damp heat"]}, {"statement": "Damp heat failures were attributed to delamination, junction box lids falling off, electrical insulation faults, and power loss.", "direct_quote": "due to delamination, junction box lids falling off, electrical insulation faults and power loss", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.36, "confidence": 0.91, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": ["delamination", "junction box", "electrical insulation", "damp heat failure modes"]}, {"statement": "Post-DH2000 delamination was observed with bubbles encroaching from the glass-glass laminate edge to the bussing ribbon and onto the cell surface, creating a safety risk and IEC 61730 non-compliance.", "direct_quote": "bubbles encroaching from the glass//glass laminate edge (under the frame) to the bussing ribbon and onto the cell surface", "fact_category": "measurement", "relevance_score": 0.38, "confidence": 0.87, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": ["DH2000", "delamination", "bubbles", "glass-glass laminate", "IEC 61730"]}, {"statement": "Potential root causes of post-DH2000 delamination include use of POE plus EVA encapsulant rather than POE plus POE, reduced encapsulant thickness, and reduced lamination time.", "direct_quote": "the use of POE + EVA encapsulant rather than more traditional POE + POE; a reduction in encapsulant thickness; and/or a reduction in lamination time", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.34, "confidence": 0.86, "perspective": "Industry", "entities": ["POE", "EVA", "encapsulant thickness", "lamination time", "delamination", "cost cutting"]}, {"statement": "15 manufacturers experienced at least one failure during damp heat testing in the 2024 reporting period.", "direct_quote": "with 15 manufacturers experiencing at least one failure during DH testing", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.29, "confidence": 0.9, "perspective": "Industry", "entities": ["15 manufacturers", "damp heat failure", "PVEL"]}, {"statement": "The delamination after DH2000 creates a potential electrical path from current-carrying parts to the grounded frame, constituting an IEC 61730 safety non-compliance.", "direct_quote": "creates a safety risk by forming a potential path from the module current carrying parts to the grounded frame", "fact_category": "regulatory_threshold", "relevance_score": 0.27, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Regulatory", "entities": ["IEC 61730", "safety risk", "electrical path", "grounded frame", "delamination"]}], "evidence_summary": "PVEL 2024 industry scorecard on PV module damp heat reliability. 69% BOMs passed 6% degradation threshold; 11% failure rate (2x 2023). Delamination is a key failure mode attributed to POE+EVA cost-cutting and reduced encapsulant thickness. Relevant as general damp heat aging and delamination data for encapsulant systems, but specific to PV modules not DVS-PEI in flexible electronics."}]}
